race.comment: Open race but want to give DAVIDA (3) another chance on the quick backup. She's normally an on pace type but just stepped slowly from a wide gate and they went back, running on for fifth to Cruiserweight who looks very progressive. The caveat to that is they went quickly up front and those with cover were suited on the day but she should jump and run here which can see her hard to run down. Wary of the progressive LAURA ELIZA (14) who won her maiden dominantly at the second time of asking at Sale in fast time. Right down in the weights here and can measure up with more to come. MISSAPPREHEND (8) just found one better first up and that horse has since finished third in the Cruiserweight race which ties in DAVIDA. Gets a lovely 3kg claim for Jabez Johnstone and will be hard to beat. SALIZOU (11) won well fresh and could measure up, ZUPPA INGLESE (13) is going quite well and draws nicely with no weight, include.
